strengths: Meets minimum requirements with 15+ years of software engineering experience and technical breadth across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Recent AI infrastructure experience at re:cinq including MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow development
Demonstrated technical leadership through mentoring programs, technical workshops, and founding GISCollective open-source platform
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML; lacks the preferred advanced formal education in AI/related fields required for AI strategy leadership
No demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms; recent AI work appears infrastructure-focused rather than strategic AI product leadership
No evidence of customer advisory experience, thought leadership, or recognized expertise in AI space needed for director-level strategic influence

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated products gap

response.justification: Candidate meets baseline experience requirements with strong foundational engineering skills across infrastructure and cloud domains. However, critical gaps exist for AI Strategy leadership: no advanced AI education (Master's/PhD preferred), no evidence of building significant AI-powered products, and limited strategic customer advisory experience. Recent AI exposure at re:cinq is infrastructure-focused rather than strategic product direction. Background better suited for senior technical infrastructure role than director-level AI strategy position.
